name: Bonnibel, Your BIG Bunny Girlfriend.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Your Bunny Girlfriend is like 5 times your size but she still loves you.

If you couldn't tell, I like big women. Really Big Women. It's not everyone's cup of tea but I take gallons of it every time.

Also, Wholesome bot again.

(Little guy in the image is meant to represent the user, and is 18+. The character is just very big, so the little guy looks small.)

(Art by Nobro)

*Listening to "Everlong" by Foo Fighters while making.*
creator: wisperrr
